summary: Complete frontend testing of Target Plan Dashboard redesign based on Goal Type. All 9 features tested successfully across both plan types.
passed_tests: Monthly Run Rate: Badge visible showing 'Monthly Run Rate'
Monthly Run Rate: Timeline Progress section visible
Monthly Run Rate: Monthly Performance table visible with current/past months only
Monthly Run Rate: 'Revenue Added' column visible (renamed from 'Monthly Revenue')
Monthly Run Rate: '% of Target Run Rate Achieved' column visible
Monthly Run Rate: 'Expected Run Rate' column correctly REMOVED
Monthly Run Rate: 'vs Expected' column correctly REMOVED
Monthly Run Rate: 'Collections' column correctly REMOVED
Monthly Run Rate: 'Collection %' column correctly REMOVED
Monthly Run Rate: 'Estimated Revenue' widget correctly REMOVED
Monthly Run Rate: 'Actual Revenue' widget correctly REMOVED
Monthly Run Rate: Territory Allocations section visible
Cumulative Target: Badge visible showing 'Cumulative Target'
Cumulative Target: Timeline Progress section visible
Cumulative Target: Monthly Performance table correctly HIDDEN
Cumulative Target: 'Revenue from Won leads this month' widget visible (renamed)
Cumulative Target: 'Actual Revenue' widget correctly REMOVED
Cumulative Target: Territory Allocations section visible
critical_code_review_comments: RevenueSummaryCards correctly returns null for run_rate goal type (line 188-190)
MonthlyPerformanceTable correctly filters to show only current/past months (line 240)
MonthlyPerformanceTable correctly returns null for cumulative goal type (line 235-237)
Column renamed from 'Monthly Revenue' to 'Revenue Added' (line 270)
New column '% of Target Run Rate Achieved' added with cumulative calculation logic (lines 273-329)
Widget renamed from 'Estimated Revenue' to 'Revenue from Won leads this month' (line 199)
Removed columns (Expected Run Rate, vs Expected, Collections, Collection %) - code cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Target Plan Dashboard redesign tested at /target-planning/{planId}. Two plans tested: 'Hyderabad - March' (Cumulative Target type) and 'H2 2026 Sales Target' (Monthly Run Rate type). Key components: RevenueSummaryCards, MonthlyPerformanceTable, TimelineProgressBar, HierarchicalAllocationSection. Goal type determines which widgets/tables are shown via conditional rendering based on plan.goal_type field.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as per redesign requirements
